verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Be careful little eyes what you see Be careful little eyes what you see There's a Saviour up above watching over you in love So be careful little eyes what you see

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Be careful little ears what you hear Be careful little ears what you hear There's a Saviour up above watching over you in love So be careful little ears what you hear

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Be careful little hands what you do Be careful little hands what you do There's a Saviour up above watching over you in love So be careful little hands what you do

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Be careful little feet where you go Be careful little feet where you go There's a Saviour up above watching over you in love So be careful little feet where you go

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Be careful little toungue what you say Be careful little toungue what you say There's a Saviour up above watching over you in love So be careful little toungue what you say

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So watch your eyes, your ears, your hands, your feet, your tounge So watch your eyes, your ears, your hands, your feet, your tounge There's a Saviour up above watching over you in love So watch your eyes, your ears, your hands, your feet, your tounge

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Be careful little mind what you think Be careful little mind what you think There's a Saviour up above watching over you in love So bee careful little mind what you think

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Be careful little heart whom you trust Be careful little heart whom you trust There's a Saviour up above watching over you in love So be careful little heart whom you trust

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: So watch your eyes, your ears, your hands, your feet, your tounge, your mind, your heart So watch your eyes, your ears, your hands, your feet, your tounge, your mind, your heart There's a Saviour up above watching over you in love So watch your eyes, your ears, your hands, your feet, your tounge, your mind, your heart
